parents.subject: LU-18030 tests: Add a test to ensure permissions copy on nfs

commit.subject: LU-17412 tests: snapshot_create with mounted snapshot FS
commit.message:
LU-17412 tests: snapshot_create with mounted snapshot FS

Creating a snapshot after mounting another snapshot fails and
causes the barrier to get into a "failed" state. The following
error is seen:

-> lctl snapshot_create -F testfs -n snap1
-> lctl snapshot_mount -F testfs -n snap1
mounted the snapshot snap1 with fsname 7a47062d
-> lctl snapshot_create -F testfs -n snap2
Fail to freeze barrier for testfs: Object is remote
Can't create the snapshot snap2

Add the abode testcase to the existing sanity-lsnapshot.sh
(test_1c) to consistently reproduce the above issue.

HPE-bug-id: LUS-12002
Test-Parameters: fstype=zfs testlist=sanity-lsnapshot
Signed-off-by: Akash B <akash-b@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I39092382afef7a249b0e216579e0d3b3fea5db00
